## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Security-related change

## Related issues

Link issues using keywords, for example: `Closes #123`

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m py_compile vscanner.py scanner_v2/*.py scanner_v2/plugins/*.py tests/test_scanner_v2.py tests/integration/test_container_stack.py scripts/benchmark_v2.py`
- [ ] `python -m unittest tests/test_scanner_v2.py`
- [ ] Integration test executed or intentionally skipped with reason

## Screenshots (if UI changes)

Add before/after screenshots.

## Security impact

- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Security impact reviewed and documented below

Security notes:

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed project conventions and kept changes focused.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where relevant.
- [ ] I updated README/docs for user-facing changes.
- [ ] I removed secrets and sensitive data from commits/logs.
